title: How to Stop Overeating: 8 Herbal Teas for Teenagers
description: Silybum marianum teas, also known as milk thistle tea, has been traditionally used to help with overeating. The reason it's effective is due to its active compounds, particularly silymarin and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds help protect the liver from damage caused by excessive food intake, reducing the risk of liver disease and improving digestion. When consumed as a tea, Silybum marianum helps to regulate appetite, reduce cravings...
